name: slidev-deck-stack
description: Slidev deck stack plugins for building correct, maintainable technical presentations with Slidev, Markdown, Vue, and code-driven diagrams

plugins.name: slidev-deck-stack
plugins.description: Cross-feature integration rules and recipes for Slidev v52 + Vue + Markdown + UnoCSS + Shiki magic-move + Mermaid/PlantUML + KaTeX + built-in layouts + v-click/v-motion + export PDF/PPTX/PNG/SPA. Enforces 8 iron rules that prevent common pitfalls in slide structure, code, animation, theming, and export.
